name: Squad Goals
author: Poki
description: Squad Goals is a fun and simple 3D soccer game that can quickly turn into a crazy ball brawl! In this version of soccer, there are no cards, no fouls and no offsides! Slide, tackle, dribble, kick, shoot, and score your way to victory. Whoever scores first wins the match! With the money you earn from winning matches, you can make your character stronger and faster. You can also use the coins to decorate your stadium with new fields, goalposts and more! Remember to check in every day for new rewards and daily quests to complete. Prove that you are the king of the field! How to play Squad Goals? Drag the mouse, use WASD or use the arrow keys to move around! Release the mouse or the keys to do a tackle when you don't have the ball! Release the mouse or the keys to shoot when you do have the ball! Who created Squad Goals? Squad Goals was created by Prune Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Squad Goals for free? You can play Squad Goals for free on Poki. Can I play Squad Goals on mobile devices and desktop? Squad Goals can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
